nodes.summary: The initial alarm screen shows two existing alarms (8:30 AM and 9:00 AM) with options to configure them. It also has a floating action button to add a new alarm and a bottom navigation bar with Alarm, Clock, Timer, Stopwatch, and Bedtime tabs.
A calendar view overlay for selecting a start and end date to pause an alarm. It displays March 2026 and allows navigation through months. There are options to Cancel or OK the date selection.

edges.action: Tapped the toggle switch for 8:30 AM alarm

Tapped toggle switch for 8:30 AM alarm, leading to date selection
Tapped date 21, moving calendar to April 2026
